one_time_description: Lawsuit settlement accrued in accounts payable at March 31, 2020; claim was for $355,750 but settled for $125,000 subsequent to year-end
economic_notes: Magnus James Enterprises LP is the sole government business enterprise, 99% owned by McDowell Lake First Nation. Revenue $131,975, expenses $80,975, net assets $876,947. Also holds portfolio investments in K-Net LP, First Nation LP, NCC Development LP. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event affecting program delivery.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Ontario based on auditor location (Kenora, ON). Magnus James Enterprises LP is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis. Long-term investments include portfolio investments in K-Net LP, First Nation LP, NCC Development LP. No long-term debt. Contributions repayable of $866,241 included in accounts payable. Lawsuit settled post year-end for $125,000 accrued in accounts payable. COVID-19 disclosed as subsequent event. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue $1,343,520 minus total government transfers $555,045 = $788,475 (includes Other Grants $122,257, Other Revenues $615,047, GBE income $51,172). Community and Economic Development expenses $611,641 classified under expenses_enterprises as closest category.
